title: ListIndicatorsRequest
description: Request to list indicators from an investigation

GraphArn.description: The ARN of the behavior graph.

InvestigationId.description: The investigation ID of the investigation report.

IndicatorType.description: For the list of indicators of compromise that are generated by Detective investigations, see Detective investigations.

NextToken.description: List if there are more results available.

MaxResults.description: The maximum number of results to return.
